label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a present of a different color. The initial gifts are as follows: - Alice: brown present - Bob: orange ball - Claire: purple present - Dave: yellow present - Eve: white present Then there are a series of swaps. Let me track each swap step by step. Maybe I should make a table or list the current state after each swap. First swap: Bob and Eve swap their gifts. Initially: - Bob has orange ball - Eve has white present After swap: - Bob now has white present - Eve now has orange ball Second swap: Bob and Claire swap their gifts. Current before swap: - Bob has white present - Claire has purple present After swap: - Bob now has purple present - Claire now has white present Third swap: Dave and Alice swap their gifts. Initially: - Dave has yellow present - Alice has brown present After swap: - Dave now has brown present - Alice now has yellow present Fourth swap: Bob and Eve swap their gifts again. Current before swap: - Bob has purple present - Eve has orange ball After swap: - Bob now has orange ball - Eve now has purple present Fifth swap: Alice and Bob swap their gifts. Current before swap: - Alice has yellow present - Bob has orange ball After swap: - Alice now has orange ball - Bob now has yellow present So at the end of all swaps, Bob has the yellow present. Therefore, the answer should be (D) yellow present. But let me double check to make sure I didn't make a mistake in tracking the swaps. 1st swap (Bob-Eve): Bob has white,
